title: Dictionary of National Biography
body: The Dictionary of National Biography (DNB) is a standard work of reference on notable figures from British history, published since 1885. The updated Oxford Dictionary of National Biography (ODNB) was published on 23 September 2004 in 60 volumes and online, with 50,113 biographical articles covering 54,922 lives.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English with Oxford spelling
Articles with unsourced statements from December 2021
Official website different in Wikidata and Wikipedia
Short description is different from Wikidata
